import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        if neg
          nums = __list_int_push(nums, 0 - cur)
        else
          nums = __list_int_push(nums, cur)
        end
        has = false
        cur = 0
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
      has = true
    else if b == 43 and not has
      neg = false
      has = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      nums = __list_int_push(nums, 0 - cur)
    else
      nums = __list_int_push(nums, cur)
    end
  end

  let len = nums.len()
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  mut running = 0
  while j < len
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      running = v
    else if v > running
      running = v
    end
    if j == 0
      out = "#{running}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{running}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
